SEARCH

Uses of Package
cpdt.common.models

Packages that use cpdt.common.models
Package
Description
cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator
Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.devices
Contains implementations of simulated devices, including sensors and future actuators.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.models used by cpdt.common.models
    Class
    Description
    Location
    Immutable value object representing the physical location of a device within the simulated chemical plant.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.models used by cpdt.simulator
    Class
    Description
    Device
    Abstract base class representing a physical device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    Location
    Immutable value object representing the physical location of a device within the simulated chemical plant.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.models used by cpdt.simulator.devices
    Class
    Description
    Device
    Abstract base class representing a physical device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    Location
    Immutable value object representing the physical location of a device within the simulated chemical plant.
